response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and user experience, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His leadership and mentoring experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps contexts, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and mentoring across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded).
Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and technical workshops/talks, indicating strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills.
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, real-time data processing, and infrastructure (e.g., Kubernetes, low-latency services).
concerns: Only limited experience with C++ (primarily at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit mention of production-level cloud architecture or compute platform leadership, despite some infrastructure work.
Recent roles emphasize full-stack and AI-agent tooling, diverging from the cloud compute focus of this role.
